package: GoalOS Signoff Pro — Sovereign Experience Stream Lab

doctrine.thesis: Validated proof becomes governed experience; governed experience can update routing, memory, reward ledgers, and temporal options only after replay and validation.
doctrine.claimBoundary: Browser-local synthetic public demonstration only. No user data, no uploads, no wallet, no payments, no value movement, no external audit claim, no empirical SOTA claim, and no live settlement claim.
doctrine.law: Output is not memory. Activity is not learning. Replayable proof-cleared experience is learning authority.

scenarios.label: AI research acceptance
scenarios.objective: Convert an AI-generated research brief into a governed decision state.

scenarios.label: Software delivery review
scenarios.objective: Review an AI-delivered software milestone for evidence, tests, and rollback readiness.

scenarios.label: Defensive readiness packet
scenarios.objective: Package a public-safe defensive readiness assessment into replayable proof.

scenarios.label: Policy option proof
scenarios.objective: Turn a policy option memo into traceable claims, uncertainties, risks, and a governed decision state.
